mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ENTRPRS_MBER ( ENTRPRS_MBER_ID , ENTRPRS_SE_CODE , BIZRNO , JURIRNO , CMPNY_NM , CXFC , ZIP , ADRES , FXNUM , INDUTY_CODE , APPLCNT_NM , APPLCNT_IHIDNUM , SBSCRB_DE , ENTRPRS_MBER_STTUS , ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD , ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_HINT , ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_CNSR , GROUP_ID , DETAIL_ADRES , APPLCNT_EMAIL_ADRES , TELNO , ESNTL_ID , FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , FRST_REGISTER_ID ) VALUES ( #{entrprsMberId}, #{entrprsSeCode}, #{bizrno}, #{jurirno}, #{cmpnyNm}, #{cxfc}, #{zip}, #{adres}, #{fxnum}, #{indutyCode}, #{applcntNm}, #{applcntIhidnum}, sysdate(), #{entrprsMberSttus}, #{entrprsMberPassword}, #{entrprsMberPasswordHint}, #{entrprsMberPasswordCnsr}, #{groupId}, #{detailAdres}, #{applcntEmailAdres}, #{telno}, #{uniqId}, sysdate(), #{entrprsMberId} )
mapper.select: SELECT ESNTL_ID uniqId, ENTRPRS_MBER_ID entrprsMberId, ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_HINT entrprsMberPasswordHint, ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_CNSR entrprsMberPasswordCnsr, ENTRPRS_SE_CODE entrprsSeCode, BIZRNO bizrno, JURIRNO jurirno, CMPNY_NM cmpnyNm, CXFC cxfc, INDUTY_CODE indutyCode, APPLCNT_NM applcntNm, APPLCNT_IHIDNUM applcntIhidnum, APPLCNT_EMAIL_ADRES applcntEmailAdres, ENTRPRS_MBER_STTUS entrprsMberSttus, TELNO telno, FXNUM fxnum, ZIP zip, ADRES adres, DETAIL_ADRES detailAdres, GROUP_ID groupId, TO_CHAR(SBSCRB_DE,'YYYY-MM-DD') sbscrbDe FROM TB_ENTRPRS_MBER WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ENTRPRS_MBER SET ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_HINT = #{entrprsMberPasswordHint}, ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD_CNSR = #{entrprsMberPasswordCnsr}, ENTRPRS_SE_CODE = #{entrprsSeCode}, BIZRNO = #{bizrno}, JURIRNO = #{jurirno}, CMPNY_NM = #{cmpnyNm}, CXFC = #{cxfc}, INDUTY_CODE = #{indutyCode}, APPLCNT_NM = #{applcntNm}, APPLCNT_EMAIL_ADRES = #{applcntEmailAdres}, ENTRPRS_MBER_STTUS = #{entrprsMberSttus}, TELNO = #{telno}, FXNUM = #{fxnum}, ZIP = #{zip}, ADRES = #{adres}, DETAIL_ADRES = #{detailAdres}, GROUP_ID = #{groupId} WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
mapper.select: SELECT USE_STPLAT_ID, USE_STPLAT_CN, INFO_PROVD_AGRE_CN FROM TB_STPLAT_INFO WHERE USE_STPLAT_ID = #{stplatId}

SELECT COUNT(1) usedCnt FROM ( SELECT EMPLYR_ID userId FROM TB_EMPLYR_INFO UNION ALL SELECT ENTRPRS_MBER_ID userId FROM TB_ENTRPRS_MBER UNION ALL SELECT MBER_ID userId FROM TB_GNRL_MBER ) A WHERE userId = #{checkId}
